XML Documentation to Markdown Generator

Commands:
  docs (aliases: d)
  Description: Generate markdown documentation

  Arguments:
    -path                 (-p  )   Root folder
    -output               (-o  )   Output folder
    -uri                  (-u  )   Base URI for references
